narrative: US-Iran negotiation deadlock and energy shocks drive a flight to the dollar as DXY hits one-month highs — gold lower -1.59%; equities -0.67%; DXY +0.12%; VIX 18.1. USD/AUD bilateral divergence dominates G8 flows (spread 1.669%) as AUD/USD retreats to 0.7111; RBA-Fed -60bp carry fails to offset geopolitical risk. USD/JPY holds 159.004 as -60bp carry sustains the bid despite BoJ Gov Ueda's warning on rising yields and a strong -1.52 25d RR put skew. Watch RBNZ Rate Decision May 27 at 02:00 UTC.
